curation_notes: Re-curated with updated guidelines. The advisory explicitly references src/executor.ts line 304 where the property key parameter b is typed as string but never enforced at runtime, enabling a TOCTOU attack via custom toString() coercion. The patch changes b's type to PropertyKey and adds an isPropertyKey() guard that coerces non-PropertyKey values to strings before use, closing the TOCTOU gap. assignCheck was also patched to use Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call() instead of calling .hasOwnProperty() directly on the object, closing a secondary TOCTOU vector. Vulnerability class race-condition confirmed from CWE-367 (TOCTOU) and validated against the patch diff. The patch modifies 4 non-test source files (SandboxExec.ts, executor.ts, parser.ts, utils.ts), making it noisy. Primary locations derived from the advisory description pointing to executor.ts, confirmed by the patch diff.
